title: Really Useful Box Plastic Storage 4 Litre Clear with 2 x Hobby Trays
features: Part of a large range of Really Useful Products
Perfect for craft and paper storage
Stackable with the same Really Useful Box
Strong, stackable, storage box, complete with lockable lid
description: A mountain of messy paperwork is the last thing anybody needs during work, but with the 4 litre Really Useful Box which has been designed specifically to hold up to an entire ream of A4 paper (500 sheets), organising your desk, and clearing away all that paper work can be made easy. This box can be used for a simple tray, holding all your paperwork, or with the lid (which is included), it becomes a secure locking storage box. The transparent design makes it easy for you to see the contents of the box, and its reinforced edges keep it super strong. If you're looking to organise your crafting products, this Really Useful Box can simply be fitted with a hobby tray designed for this very box.
